routers.title: SMS routers
routers.description: Manage the routers exposed to SMS orchestration from the admin area.

empty.title: No routers configured
empty.description: Add a first router to prepare future delivery integrations.

error.title: Unable to load routers
error.description: The /routers backend exists, but loading failed.

dialog.description: Fill in the admin router contract exactly as campaigns will consume it.

help.isActive: Disable a router to retire it without losing historical links.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this router?
deleteConfirm.description: Router "{name}" will be deleted only if no partner or campaign still uses it.

alerts.deleteInUseDescription: This router is still referenced. Disable it instead of deleting it.

variableSchemas.title: Variable schemas
variableSchemas.description: Admin foundation to manage schemas linked to campaigns and landing pages.

empty.title: No variable schemas yet
empty.description: Add a first schema to prepare campaigns and landing pages.

error.title: Unable to load schemas
error.description: The variable-schemas contract exists, but loading failed.

cloneDialog.title: Clone this schema?
cloneDialog.description: The clone will be created with the (copy) suffix from "{name}".

editorPlaceholder.title: Editor is being prepared
editorPlaceholder.description: Navigation and listing are ready, the stepper lands in step 10.3.
editorPlaceholder.body: The full create / edit form will be connected in the next sub-step of the track.

newPage.title: New variable schema
newPage.description: Build a schema in 3 steps and connect it to campaigns and landing pages.

editPage.title: Edit variable schema
editPage.description: Adjust variables and preview data exposed to campaigns.
editPage.notFoundDescription: This schema could not be loaded or you do not have access to it.

discoverDialog.title: Discover from CSV
discoverDialog.description: Upload a sample CSV to prefill the schema and its preview datasets.
discoverDialog.fileHint: Select a .csv file to start discovery.
discoverDialog.error: Discovery failed. You can keep filling the form manually.

validation.name: The schema name is required before starting discovery.
validation.file: Add a CSV file to continue.

pending.title: Backend discovery still pending
pending.description: The endpoint exists but still returns 501. Continue the schema manually for now.

create.title: New schema
create.description: Prepare the shared variable structure used by campaigns and landing pages.

edit.title: Edit schema
edit.description: Update the structure and preview data without leaving the admin area.

partnerScope.title: Partner required
partnerScope.description: Select a partner in the admin header before creating a schema.
partnerScope.scopedDescription: This schema will be created in the {name} scope.

identity.title: Name and starting point
identity.description: Define the schema identity, then optionally try a CSV-based pre-discovery.
identity.discoverDescription: The backend can eventually suggest an initial structure from a source file.

fieldsStep.title: Exposed variables
fieldsStep.description: Define global and recipient variables that will be interpolated in messages.
fieldsStep.notice: The used status is informational only to stay aligned with the current API.
fieldsStep.empty: No variables yet. Add at least one variable to continue.
fieldsStep.error: Add at least one non-empty variable.

datasets.title: JSON datasets
datasets.description: Provide sample data to preview how the variables will render.
datasets.jsonError: JSON must be a valid object.

form.descriptionCreate: Create a new user account on the platform.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
